name: Salmon Cakes or Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Tabasco or dash cayenne pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Form into patties and place on a greased baking sheet or portion into greased muffin cups.
3. Bake at 400°F for about 20 minutes.
Serves 7 preschoolers or 5 school-age children
1 meat
